_comment: Codex's MCP subsystem only supports stdio servers. Our SCOPE MCP server is HTTP+OAuth at https://scope-mcp.langguard.ai/mcp, so we bridge with mcp-remote (https://github.com/geelen/mcp-remote) which proxies stdio↔HTTP and handles the OAuth dance on first run. The token is cached under ~/.mcp-auth/ so it persists across Codex restarts.
